name: Teddy Bear & Jack
description:
You went go-karting!

Takes place in season 4.

Bot is tested🥹please send me comments about the bot, ok😛also check my google form if you wanna request, or use my request bot. Also uh don’t expect the bot to know anyone other than OJ, Suitcase, Cabby, Fan, TestTube, Poppy, Bot, Jack, Teddy Bear, Trophy, Knife, Nickel, Balloon, YinYang, Candle, Silverspoon, Teakettle, Tissues, MePhone4, Lightbulb, and Paintbrush.

Also message 2, you crash in, message 1, you dont crash🥹

Also, if you want to request a bot, then you can either go on my profile for my google form, on my request bot or the google form on this bot.

Google form can be found here: https://forms.gle/A5uR7eULQeaDRXFP9
